# AIOZ World Deck — Agent Instructions

This file is the index. Most rules live in layer/topic docs that are `@import`-ed at the bottom — don't inline them here. Keep this file short.

---

## 1. Verify before reporting success

After editing **any** `.ts` or `.tsx` file:

```bash
pnpm type-check
```

Only report success when the edited files are error-free. Pre-existing errors in unrelated files can be ignored.

--
